top_signals.title: Oil Prices Jump After US Strikes Iran | The China Show | 7/8/2026
top_signals.summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Haidi Stroud-Watts and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Strait of Hormuz threat level raised to 'severe' after Iran attacks tankers using U.S. Navy route
top_signals.summary: Iran's military has warned it will target ships that do not use a northern route approved by Tehran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Australia Turns to Rugby to Pull Pacific Islands Away From China
top_signals.summary: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has had one overarching regional goal since taking office — stop China gaining a military foothold in the Pacific. He’s been ready to harness any tool available to further it, including sport.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Meta enters AI image model race in bid to court advertisers and subscribers
top_signals.summary: Meta has announced Muse Image, its first AI model for image creation, as it seeks to attract creators and advertisers to its offerings.

top_signals.title: Blue Owl Buys £1.3 Billion UK Private Hospital Portfolio
top_signals.summary: Blue Owl Capital Inc has completed a deal to buy a portfolio of UK private hospitals from Malaysia’s Employees Provident Fund.
